buckets.description: Questions that test the identification of reproductive parts in plants and humans and their specific functions.
Questions that focus on the processes of pollination and fertilisation in both plants and animals, including the agents and conditions required.
Questions about the methods, structural adaptations, and advantages of fruit and seed dispersal in plants.
Questions that require interpreting data from charts and graphs or understanding experimental setups related to any aspect of reproduction.

otherSamples.reason: The question covers both the identification of reproductive parts (human ovary) and the processes of pollination and fertilisation in plants, fitting two distinct sub-topics equally.
